title: rebuildcursor
text: rebuildcursor Declares a new cursor. USYS$INF_PARAMS rebuildcursor Description The error $dberror -404 (cursor specification cannot be executed) can occur if you retrieve data followed by the activation of a stored procedure, in a component with property transaction set to true, and the database path used to retrieve data is the same of the stored procedure execution path. The rebuildcursor option declares a new cursor and rebuilds the select statement. If this option is not present, no new cursor is declared. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
